title: hymenophyllum bontocense
intro: Hymenophyllum bontocense is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the resurrection fern due to its ability to dry out and revive when water becomes available. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum bontocense include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making teas or infusions from its dried fronds, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
